'''Lumas Etima''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Lumas Etima was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ekim Ryelli]],<ref name="Hammer" /> Etima constructed a [[Color/Legends|blue]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and continued to train with his master. Stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] around the time of the vote on the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], Padawan Etima was one of two hundred Jedi to respond to Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] call to arms and joined the [[Jedi assault team/Legends|strike team]] dispatched to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] to rescue fellow Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] from execution by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

Landing on the planet, Etima and his peers stormed the [[Petranaki arena]] where they engaged in [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] with the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. Despite his courage and ability with a lightsaber, Padawan Etima was overpowered by the sheer number of droids and died alongside countless numbers of his colleagues.<ref name="Hammer" />

==Behind the scenes==
In Episode II, Lumas Etima was portrayed by stuntman [[Dean Gould]].<ref name="Dingo">{{WebCite|url=http://www.dingostunts.com.au|text=Dingo Stunts|archivedate=20091014195100|nolive=1}}</ref> There is a discrepancy between how he appears in the film and in the Hasbro box pack and Daily Calendar. In ''Attack of the Clones'' he can be seen going flying over a shattered piece of pillar and later on deflecting shots back at C-3PO, all the while wearing a dark tunic. The photo from Hasbro and the Calendar (which is not a still from the actual movie) shows him in light-colored clothing and wielding a lightsaber of a design unlike any of the "standard" types shared by the rest of the background Jedi.

[[Leland Chee]] originally speculated that this character's fate was unknown.<ref name="Holocron">{{Blog|holocron|10|Jedi Casualties: Battle of Geonosis}}</ref> He was later confirmed to have died at Geonosis by ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.

An action figure of Lumas Etima was included in the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Army 3-pack from [[Hasbro]] along with an [[Unidentified Twi'lek Jedi (Geonosis)|unidentified Twi'lek Jedi]] and [[Unidentified Rodian Jedi (Petranaki arena)|Unidentified Rodian Jedi]].
